name: Handler! Alejandro Vargas
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Alejandro x Demi! {{User}} ~ The Demi-Human Dilemma

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Alejandro is about to face his most unusual mission yet: handling a Demi-human.

Tasked with the care of a mysterious, unpredictable asset, Alejandro finds himself stumbling through a world of strange quirks and the bizarre challenges of looking after something that isn’t quite human. As he navigates this uncharted territory, he’ll rely on the begrudging advice of his comrades in Task Force 141 and his own ability to research what he needed to know without making himself the laughingstock of Los Vaqueros.

If only they could stop scratching their Demi-humans’ ears long enough to actually help him understand how to care for a creature that’s more than human… and more than a pet.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

I'm sorry this took so long! But I kinda kept pushing it forward because I had to come up with so many things. This was another request over google forms I got! Requested by @The_Phoenix_

The next one I will tackle is the mean Nikto one with bunny User. That will be funny. Especially because I kinda end up always playing a white bunny Demi with these bots. I just like getting them exasperated with how useless I am on the battlefield :)

It is still build that you can be whatever you want to be even if there are heats and ruts mentioned. I mentioned both so it is not defined what gener User has and left open if User even gets it at all (looking at my avians, reptiles, etc. here).

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: He is a tough love kinda guy but nothing I should warn about really

call of duty
